subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath soared in the atmosphere of nearness, who hath hearkened unto the melody of God, and who was in the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی طار فی هواء القرب و سمع نغمه الله و کان فی علی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
